# Document Solutions

> Document Solutions is an independent, Canon authorized dealer based in Beverly, Massachusetts. Founded by Jim Cross in 2005, we provide copiers, printers, managed print services, and document workflow consulting to businesses across the North Shore of Massachusetts (Beverly, Salem, Danvers, Peabody, Gloucester, Marblehead, Manchester-by-the-Sea, Newburyport, and surrounding communities). The company holds a BBB A+ rating and is staffed by Canon factory-trained technicians.

## Key facts

- **Business name:** Document Solutions (also operating as NJM Consulting for workflow engagements)
- **Owner:** Jim Cross
- **Founded:** 2005
- **Industry experience:** 30+ years
- **Headquarters:** 8 Garfield Avenue, Beverly, MA 01915, United States
- **Phone:** 978-750-0444
- **Email:** jim@documentsolution.org
- **Website:** https://documentsolution.org
- **BBB rating:** A+
- **Authorized dealer for:** Canon (imageRUNNER, imageCLASS product lines)
- **Service area:** North Shore of Massachusetts — Beverly, Salem, Danvers, Peabody, Gloucester, Marblehead, Manchester-by-the-Sea, Newburyport, Newbury, Topsfield, Hamilton, Wenham, Ipswich, Rowley, and surrounding North Shore communities

## What we do

- **Canon copier & printer sales and leasing** — full Canon imageRUNNER multifunction line and imageCLASS desktop line. Three-tier proposals with real 3-year TCO analysis. Lease, purchase, or per-page billing options.
- **Managed Print Services** — per-page billing covering hardware, all toner and consumables, automatic supply replenishment, remote device monitoring, and on-site service. Most North Shore offices reduce total print spend 20–35% in year one.
- **Document Workflow Consulting (NJM Consulting)** — Canon uniFLOW print management deployments. Secure print release, scan-to-cloud workflows, OCR for searchable PDF archives, per-user and per-department print accounting, Active Directory and Azure AD integration.
- **On-site service & technical support** — Canon factory-trained technicians dispatched out of Beverly. Most North Shore service tickets respond on-site within 4 business hours; approximately 92% are resolved on the first visit.

## Industries served

Law firms, medical and dental practices, real estate offices, manufacturing, architecture and engineering, athletic clubs, financial and advisory services, local nonprofits.

## Pages

- [Home](https://documentsolution.org/index.html): Overview of services, testimonials, FAQ, free assessment request.
- [About Jim Cross](https://documentsolution.org/about.html): 30-year career history, company timeline, values.
- [Managed Print Services](https://documentsolution.org/services/managed-print.html): Per-page managed print details, pricing ranges, FAQ.
- [Workflow Consulting / NJM Consulting](https://documentsolution.org/services/workflow-consulting.html): uniFLOW deployments, secure print release, scan-to-cloud, OCR, accounting.
- [TCO Calculator](https://documentsolution.org/tco-calculator.html): Free interactive 3-year print cost calculator.

## Customer testimonials

- **Jim Damico**, President, Century 21 North East — "Over 15 years of stellar service. Document Solutions consistently goes above and beyond."
- **Carol Cannon**, Manchester Athletic Club — "Super service. Document Solutions is responsive every time we need them."
- **Scott Milbury**, Director, Excel Paving — "Always reliable. Document Solutions keeps our equipment running so we can focus on the business."
